title: Chokie
content:
{{Top|leg}} [[File:Chokie.jpg|thumb|right|115px|A box of chokie on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].]] {{Quote|How do you make fresh dried chokie?''"
"''Well, ya find yourself some chokie while it's fresh, and y'leave it in the Dune Sea for three days.|[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and Grendle|[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]]}} '''Chokie''' was a popular food product sold in a box on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was prepared as fresh dried chokie by being harvested while fresh, then set out to dry in the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] for three days. The food vendor [[Grendle]] sold these at a stand near the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]]. Chokie was also exported to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where it was sold by a [[Roonan/Legends|Roonan]] at [[CorusMall]] near the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]]. ==History== [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] could ask to purchase a box of chokie from [[Grendle]] on Tatooine, or alternatively ask for a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]], which would prompt Grendle to direct him to [[Anabar]], another vendor, who would sell him the detonator. If Qui-Gon killed Grendle before making a purchase, a box of chokie would be dropped for him to pick up, or if he killed Grendle after already purchasing the box, he would instead drop a single piece of chokie. After obtaining a box of chokie, Qui-Gon would then be able to give it to an [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]], but would not get anything in return. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Plants of Tatooine]] [[Category:Tatooinian food]]
